    209 +
    210 +func computeExpireAt(now time.Time, ttl, defaultTTL time.Duration) int64 {
    211 +       effectiveTTL := ttl
    212 +       if ttl == 0 {
    213 +               effectiveTTL = defaultTTL
    214 +       }
    215 +       if effectiveTTL <= 0 {
    216 +               return 0
    217 +       }
    218 +       return now.Add(effectiveTTL).UnixNano()
    219 +}
    220 +
    221 +func (s *shard[V]) evictOverflow() {
    222 +       if s.maxEntries <= 0 {
    223 +               return
    224 +       }
    225 +       for len(s.items) > s.maxEntries {
    226 +               back := s.lru.Back()
    227 +               if back == nil {
    228 +                       return
    229 +               }
    230 +               s.removeElement(back)
    231 +       }
    232 +}
    233 +
    234 +func (s *shard[V]) removeElement(el *list.Element) {
    235 +       en := el.Value.(*entry[V])
    236 +       delete(s.items, en.key)
    237 +       s.lru.Remove(el)
    238 +}
    239 +
    240 +func (e *entry[V]) expired(now int64) bool {
    241 +       return e.expiresAt > 0 && now >= e.expiresAt
    242 +}
    243 +
    244 +func fnv1a64(s string) uint64 {
    245 +       var h uint64 = 14695981039346656037
    246 +       const prime64 = 1099511628211
    247 +       for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ {
    248 +               h ^= uint64(s[i])
    249 +               h *= prime64
    250 +       }
    251 +       return h
    252 +}
    253 +
    254 +var _ = atomic.Bool{}


  Would you like to make the following edits?

  Reason: command failed; retry without sandbox?


› 1. Yes, proceed (y)
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for these files (a)
  3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently (esc)

  Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
